creator: aline@bsd.com.br
text:
The Kontact window is bigger than my screen resolution.

[aline@anderson-herzer:~]$ xdpyinfo | grep dimensions
  dimensions:    1152x768 pixels (305x203 millimeters)

[aline@anderson-herzer:~]$ xdpyinfo | grep resolution
  resolution:    96x96 dots per inch

Here is a screenshoot:
http://baderna.birosca.org/~aline/share/kontact-big.jpeg

How-To-Repeat: Just opening kontact application
